holdings.infoBox: UDOW is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares UltraPro Dow30 (UDOW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dow Jones Industrial Average index. The fund provides 3x leveraged exposure to the price-weighted Dow Jones Industrial Average, which includes 30 of the largest US companies. UDOW was launched on Feb 11, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.
